news.news: Genentech announced positive Phase III METEOROID study results showing that Enspryng (satralizumab), an IL-6 receptor monoclonal antibody, reduced the risk of relapse by 68% in patients with myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease (MOGAD). The data, presented at the 2026 American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting, supports a regulatory submission to potentially secure the first approved treatment for this rare disease.

Disc Medicine announced that data from the RALLY-MF Phase 2 trial of DISC-0974, an investigational anti-hemojuvelin monoclonal antibody, will be presented as an oral abstract at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The study evaluates the agent's efficacy in treating anemia associated with myelofibrosis.
